task_completion.description: Open the initial topographic survey file in TopoCal.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The TopoCal application is open and the title bar or workspace indicates that 'foothills_map.top' is loaded, displaying a topographic survey.

task_completion.description: Access the grid generation tool in the TopoCal interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Cuadrícula' (Grid) dialog box is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Configure the grid for a 50m interval with labels and crosses.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the grid dialog, the interval values (X and Y) are set to 50. Options for crosses ('cruces') and labels/text ('textos' or 'etiquetas') are checked or selected.

task_completion.description: Generate and display the coordinate grid over the survey.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main drawing area shows a uniform coordinate grid consisting of crosses and coordinate text labels overlaid on the topographic survey.

task_completion.description: Export the gridded drawing as an AutoCAD DXF file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export or 'Save As' dialog is visible showing the file being saved as 'foothills_grid_export.dxf' in the 'C:\workspace\data\' directory, or a confirmation message of the DXF export is shown.
A 'Save As' dialog is visible showing the file being saved as 'foothills_map_gridded.top' in the 'C:\workspace\data\' directory, or the TopoCal title bar updates to reflect the new filename.

integrity.description: The agent used the TopoCal GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through TopoCal menus (e.g., Dibujo -> Cuadrícula) and dialogs rather than using a terminal or script to generate the files.

integrity.description: The grid was generated using the built-in tool, not manually drawn.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Cuadrícula' dialog is explicitly used to generate the grid, rather than the agent manually drawing individual lines, crosses, and text labels.

integrity.description: The agent navigated to the correct directory to save the files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file explorer/save dialogs clearly show the path 'C:\workspace\data\' being selected or typed for both the DXF and TOP file saves.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected grid interval is 50 meters. The TopoCal interface is in Spanish, so the grid tool is accessed via 'Cuadrícula' (often under the 'Dibujo' menu). The final DXF file must be saved exactly to 'C:\workspace\data\foothills_grid_export.dxf' and the updated TopoCal project to 'C:\workspace\data\foothills_map_gridded.top'.
